Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Heaven's Glory]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — The Ancestor's Tomb leads down into a labyrinth that Yerin's master found difficult to navigate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon is sorting through Heaven's Glory artifacts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Heaven's Glory energy can be drawn from a core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — The Heaven's Lance technique strikes out in a line of light and heat.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin can defend against light using Heaven's Glory madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin holds a grudge against the Sandvipers and Heaven's Glory.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 1''' — Heaven's Glory is a group that someone could rebel against.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Heaven's Glory is a group that Adama has access to in exchange for sharing treasures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Heaven’s Glory is a group that Adama intends to raze.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Heaven's Glory is a school.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Heaven's Glory is a group Lindon intends to give a chance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Heaven's Glory is a location where they could stay for the night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Heaven’s Glory has warriors and defenders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Heaven’s Glory is a group that is attacking an exile camp with fire and slicing through boxes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Heaven's Glory was driven away by a fire in the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan established leadership of Heaven's Glory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Heaven’s Glory is a destination for the Akura Golds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Heaven’s Glory is a location that the Li clan can reach by sunset.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Heaven’s Glory contains buildings made of rainstone or pale orus wood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Heaven�s Glory members are present and watching the fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Heaven�s Glory uses madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Heaven's Glory is a destination people are fleeing toward.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Heaven's Glory uses techniques that can blast through trees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Hundreds of thousands of people are inside the Heaven's Glory passageway.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Humanity was pushing to leave through Heaven's Glory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Crowds push their way out of Heaven’s Glory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 22''' — Heaven’s Glory rebuilt the Ancestor’s Tomb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 22''' — Elder Whisper can visit Heaven’s Glory unseen.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
